# Samuel Dorismond — Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Samuel Dorismond: EPITA engineering student and Cybersecurity Engineering apprentice at Cyber Test Systems. A bilingual (FR/EN) site showcasing projects across web development, cybersecurity, AI/MCP and DevOps. Built with Next.js.

## Pages
- [Home](https://dorismond.fr/en): Introduction, role and featured projects.
- [About](https://dorismond.fr/en/about): Biography, professional experience, education and skills.
- [Projects](https://dorismond.fr/en/projets): All projects, filterable by category (Web, Cybersecurity, AI & MCP, DevOps, Software, Games, Academic).
- [Contact](https://dorismond.fr/en/contact): Email, LinkedIn and GitHub.

## About
Samuel Dorismond is a fourth-year engineering student at EPITA and a Cybersecurity Engineering apprentice at Cyber Test Systems (since Nov 2024), where he contributed to the Hybrid Cyber Range (CTS-HCR) and the Thailand National Cyber Exercise 2024. He previously led web development at issho (2022-2024). Skills span web development (React, Next.js, Angular), cybersecurity, AI/LLM/MCP, and DevOps/cloud.

## Contact
- Email: samuel.dorismond@yahoo.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/samuel-dorismond-a5798321b
- GitHub: https://github.com/Samuel-DD07
